title: Stay Flooded!
description: A mod that prevents air pockets from forming when submerged blocks are destroyed, perfect for an aquatic playthrough :-)
body:
A simple data-driven mod which prevents air pockets from forming when blocks are broken underwater, and allows users to register custom fluid flooding behaviour through datapacks.

![A gif of a player mining sand near the shore, showing that it keeps the water still, making it look nice and clean.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6IQHCzHA/images/ac18de08650d627f3ce0c26a3c6a5c8796b5e1f2.gif)
![A gif of a player mining around underwater, showing that the places dug out will remain underwater.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6IQHCzHA/images/147191622a1dda685d566da974255c58912fde1c.gif)

When a block is broken adjacent to a fluid, if there is only either fluid sources or solid blocks on each side and downwards, then the block will turn into a fluid source instead of an air block.

For information on how to customise the mod with datapacks, refer to [the wiki.](https://codeberg.org/snowdropp/stayfloodedmod/wiki)

If you encounter any bugs, have a suggestion or need help with the datapack customisation, don't hesitate to [raise an issue](https://codeberg.org/snowdropp/stayfloodedmod/issues)

No generative ai was used in the development of this mod! :-)
